# Directory

A dependency that is synced from a directory in a repository. The sync process will create a pull request that copies files from the specified directory in the source repository to the target repository.

## Properties

### `type`

Type: `"directory"`

### `automerge`

Type: `boolean`

Default: `False`

Whether pull requests for this dependency should be automatically merged if all checks pass.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The `microsoft-fde-bot` GitHub App must be given pull request approval bypass permissions to your repository in order to automerge PRs. You can configure this for your repository in the [`Pulumi.microsoft.yml`](https://github.com/microsoft/fde-mgmt/blob/main/infra/github/Pulumi.microsoft.yml) file.

### `repo`

Type: `string`

The name of the source repository where the dependency is located.

### `path`

Type: `string`

The path within the source repository where the dependency is located.

### `target_path`

Type: `string | null`

The path within the target repository where the dependency should be synced to. If not specified, defaults to the same as `path`.

## Examples

```yaml
type: directory
repo: fde-core
path: infra/common/libs/core
```
```yaml
type: directory
automerge: true
repo: fde-core
path: py/common/libs/models
```
```yaml
type: directory
repo: fde-core
path: py/common/libs/models
target_path: other/path/to/libs/models
```
